CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/GEORGE HOLLAND AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/SIU MA AS COUNSEL. SETTLED BY STIP. FOR A DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE UNDER THE FOLLOWING TERMS: DELON NGAI, PL. SON, WILL NOT ASSOCIATE W/ANY KNOWN GANG MEMBERS - D.NGAI WILL NOT MEET WITH ANYMORE THAN 5 JUV- ENALS IN APT. WITHOUT ADULT SUPERVISION EXCEPT FOR FAMILY FUNCTIONS & THE COOPERATIVE BOARD MUST BE GIVEN 24 HR NOTICE OF THAT FUNCTION - MINORS ARE NOT ALLOWED TO LOITER IN PUB- LIC AREAS - FUTURE DELINQUENT BEHAVIOUR BY D. NGAI WILL BE GROUNDS FOR EVICTION - DEANNE YING WILL MEET WITH COOP BOARD & WITH NEIGHBORS FORTHWITH - ALL PARTIES WILL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES - DEANNE YING WILL BECOME CURRENT ON OUT- STANDING CARRYING CHARGES. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $78.00 FOR TRANSACTION 2726P1320000 (JURY FEES), PAYABLE TO GEORGE HOLLAND, WARRANT #00014337, DATED AUG-24-1993
ORDER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND MUTUAL GENERAL RELEASE AND ORDER SEE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FOR DETAILS.
